PER PLAINTIFF, HE WAS INFORMED THAT DEFENDANT IS IN THE HOSPITAL AND HE WANTS TO GIVE DEFENDANT TIME TO RECOVER. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR RECEIVED & FILED. PLAINTIFF WILLING TO ACCEPT $500 PER MO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAGHIRIZADEH, MOHSEN AS TO DEFENDANT RASOOLI, GHOLAMHOSAIN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY GHOLAMHOSAIN RASOOLI IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $200.00 OR MORE ON THE 29TH DAY OF EVERY MONTH, COMMENCING DECEMBER 29, 2008 UNTIL THE JUDGMENT IS FULLY PAID. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REORTED. (506).
